overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Harry Potter game showing a character in a Gryffindor jacket walking along a snowy path beside railway tracks. The journey progresses from a walled corridor with distant castle views through open rural landscapes with wooden fences and scattered pine trees before returning to enclosed stone walkways.

events.description: hogwarts castle exits view behind the stone walls

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the snowy path with hogwarts castle visible ahead

tall dark stone retaining wall running parallel to the path
tall stone wall with snow-covered capstones bordering the railway
metal railway tracks with wooden sleepers partially covered in snow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of Hogwarts castle in the distance as the character walks along a snow-covered stone path flanked by high stone walls and railway tracks. The castle soon disappears from view behind the walls as the character continues forward through the enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed snowy path with rocky cliff face

events.description: left stone wall transitions to rugged rocky mountain cliff face

agents.ego_description: walking along the enclosed path with rocky terrain visible to the left side

entered.detail: large rugged rock formation with snow patches replacing the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The path continues through a narrow corridor with a high stone wall on the right and a rugged rocky cliff face on the left. Railway tracks run parallel to the path as the character maintains a steady walking pace through the enclosed snowy mountain environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rural landscape with wooden fencing

events.description: exits enclosed walls into open rural area with wooden fences and scattered trees

agents.ego_description: walking through the open countryside with wooden fences lining the right side of the path

tall evergreen pine trees scattered across the snowy landscape

elements.scene_description: The environment opens up into a wide rural landscape with wooden fences replacing the stone walls. Tall pine trees dot the snowy terrain as the path continues alongside the railway tracks through the open mountain valley with expansive sky views.

scene_state.functional_zone: return to walled walkway approaching stone structure

events.description: re-enters enclosed stone corridor as wooden fence ends
small stone railway structure becomes visible ahead in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking toward a small stone structure in the distance along the enclosed path

entered.detail: tall dark stone wall returning to border the right side of the path
stone wall bordering the railway tracks on the left side
small stone railway platform or shelter structure ahead on the path

segments.scene_description: The path returns to an enclosed stone walkway as the wooden fence ends and stone walls reappear on both sides. The character approaches a small stone railway structure in the distance while walking between the high walls alongside the snow-covered railway tracks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a snowy railway path that transitions from an open view of a distant castle into a series of enclosed stone corridors. It begins with Hogwarts visible on the horizon as the character walks between high stone walls and railway tracks, though the castle soon vanishes from sight as the path narrows. The scene then shifts into a more rugged environment, where the camera tracks the character between a towering stone wall on the right and a steep, rocky cliff face on the left. As the journey continues, the landscape briefly opens up before the path returns to a confined stone walkway flanked by high walls on both sides. The movement finally leads the character toward a small stone railway structure in the distance, maintaining a steady pace through the frozen mountain pass.
